title: Bleu_2ay's Spider Model x Fresh Animations
description: This pack makes Bleu_2ay's Spider Model compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!
body:
This pack makes Bleu_2ay's Spider Model compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!

Since Bleu_2ay's Spider Model uses a custom model for it's Spiders, it is incompatible with Fresh Animations. This pack fixes that with new models that use the appropriate animations!

Important:

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it above FA.

Load them in order:

-This Pack

-Fresh Animations

Design and model: [Bleu_2ay on Twitter](https://x.com/Bleu_2ay)

Author: [ALtheGatorMC on Twitter](https://x.com/ALtheGatorMC)
